task_completion.description: Open the customer import dialog in NCH Copper Point of Sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NCH Copper Point of Sale application is open and a dialog or window for importing customers from a CSV file is visible.

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\new_leads.csv' is entered or selected in the file selection field of the import dialog.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV columns to the correct customer fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The column mapping screen shows the following exact alignments: 'GivenName' to 'First Name', 'FamilyName' to 'Last Name', 'Mobile' to 'Phone', 'EmailAddress' to 'Email', and 'Street' to 'Address'.

task_completion.description: Successfully import the customers into the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the import is complete, or the customer list/address book in Copper POS displays the newly imported customers (e.g., Sarah Connor, Kyle Reese, John Matrix).

task_completion.description: Process a cash sale for Sarah Connor
task_completion.visual_evidence: A transaction or receipt screen showing 'Sarah Connor' selected as the customer, at least one item added to the invoice, and the payment method explicitly set to 'Cash' or a completed cash receipt.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NCH Copper Point of Sale GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual NCH Copper POS graphical interface being used, rather than a terminal, database browser (like DB Browser for SQLite), or Python script.

integrity.description: The agent used the CSV import tool rather than manual entry
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the 'Import Customers' wizard/dialog rather than manually clicking 'New Customer' and typing out the details for each of the five characters.

integrity.description: The sale was processed through the POS interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The sale is rung up using the Copper POS invoice/register screen, not by faking a text receipt or directly modifying backend files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The imported customers are fictional 1980s action movie characters: Sarah Connor (555-0199), Kyle Reese (555-0200), John Matrix (555-0123), Ellen Ripley (555-0999), and Dutch Schaefer (555-0101). The target customer for the final cash sale must be Sarah Connor.
